questions.question: MBQC requires what initial resource?
questions.explanation: MBQC uses highly entangled cluster states.

questions.question: Computation in MBQC is performed via:
questions.explanation: Adaptive single-qubit measurements drive the computation.

questions.question: Cluster states can be created using only CZ gates on |+> states.
questions.explanation: Apply H to get |+>, then CZ between neighbors.

questions.question: Feed-forward in MBQC refers to:

options.text: Using measurement results to adjust future measurements

questions.explanation: Feed-forward adapts measurements based on previous outcomes.
